regions.text: Which are the countries with the most people in them? China, India, the U.S.S.R. and the U.S.A. all have populations of over a hundred million. Some countries have less room in them than these four, but these have the greatest populations.
China: more than 600,000,000. India: more than 300,000,000. U.S.S.R.: more than 200,000,000. U.S.A.: more than 150,000,000.
It is not good for a country if it does not have enough room for all its people. A person who does not have enough room to live in may not be able to keep well.
over: more than. room: space available. well: healthy in body and mind.
